page_metadata.biotools__summary: DACT is an R package for testing mediation effects in genome-wide epigenetic studies. DACT leverages the epigenome-wide data to estimate the relative proportions of the three null cases under the composite null hypothesis. The empirical null framework has been employed for large-scale inference.
